title: Parenting is Impossible | #shorts
full_text: Mom, can you please sign me up for my after school? I want to do football. I want to do basketball. I want to do ultimate frisbee. We even have a we have a table tennis team. Can I try out for that? >> We I've been trying for the last 2 hours. It's register then pre-register. The registration doesn't start. No, you go to the New York City website and pre-register. The pre-register. I They just sent me a 9-minute YouTube tutorial on how to pre-register the pre-register. What is wrong with people today? What is wrong with you? Why do you have to play? What do you want to play? >> I want to play table. >> Do you remember how life used to be when I grew up? My friend Galileo, he just sat under a tree. All he did was look at a tree and apple fell on his head and he came up with E= MC². Everything got done mathematicians. >> What? >> You're talking about Albert Einstein.
